item.title: Kubernetes Rolling Updates and Rollbacks
item.author: Author
item.description: Rollout and Versioning What's the Version? The Version is a image version of the container. For example, nginx:1.7.0 to nginx:1.7.1 Rollout Commands Rollout Status 1 kubectl rollout status deployment/myapp-deployment Rollout History 1 kubectl rollout history deployment/myapp-deployment Deployment Strategy Let's assume You need to upgrade nginx:1.7.0 to nginx:1.7.1 now. Recreate Recreate Delete all application and create all application at a time.
